ogTitle: Darts Creek vs Dauan Island: Climate Safety

heading: Darts Creek vs Dauan Island — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Darts Creek, Queensland and Dauan Island, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Darts Creek and Dauan Island have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Darts Creek or Dauan Island safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Darts Creek has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Dauan Island scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Darts Creek scores 16/100 for bushfire risk. Dauan Island scores 20/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Darts Creek or Dauan Island?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Darts Creek has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area face minimal climate value impact based on current projections.
